cbir.notes: CBIR uses face embeddings with cosine similarity on L2-normalized vectors.

lbph.notes: LBPH expects aligned face ROI in grayscale. lbph.yml is the model used at runtime.

notes.model_type: Set to 'cbir' or 'lbph' to switch between classifiers.
notes.training_flow: Both models should be generated before runtime: run cbir.ipynb for embeddings, lbph.ipynb for classifier.
